subcodes.first_line: Blessed is He by Whose Name the Most Exalted Pen hath been set in motion, the Trump hath been sounded, and all who dwell in the Kingdom were thunderstruck [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: تبارک الذی باسمه تحرک القلم الاعلی و نفخ فی الصور و انصعق من فی ملکوت
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @spiritual transformation
